---
title: "Brazil / Europe ANS Performance"
subtitle: "DECEA · EUROCONTROL · PBWG · 2019–2025"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    logo: ""
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/benevidesjpcb/Dashboard_BRA_EUR
    scrolling: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(crosstalk)
library(zoo)

# ── Colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COL_BRA <- "#009C3B"
COL_EUR <- "#003399"
PUNCT_COLS <- c(
  "Early > 15 min" = "#2166ac",
  "Early 5–15 min" = "#92c5de",
  "Within ± 5 min" = "#4dac26",
  "Late 5–15 min"  = "#f4a582",
  "Late > 15 min"  = "#d6604d"
)

# ── Study airports ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
airports <- tribble(
  ~icao, ~name,                            ~city,            ~region,
  "SBBR","Brasília Int'l",                 "Brasília",       "Brazil",
  "SBCF","Confins",                        "Belo Horizonte", "Brazil",
  "SBCT","Afonso Pena",                    "Curitiba",       "Brazil",
  "SBEG","Eduardo Gomes",                  "Manaus",         "Brazil",
  "SBGL","Galeão",                         "Rio de Janeiro", "Brazil",
  "SBGR","Guarulhos",                      "São Paulo",      "Brazil",
  "SBKP","Viracopos",                      "Campinas",       "Brazil",
  "SBPA","Salgado Filho",                  "Porto Alegre",   "Brazil",
  "SBRF","Guararapes",                     "Recife",         "Brazil",
  "SBRJ","Santos Dumont",                  "Rio de Janeiro", "Brazil",
  "SBSP","Congonhas",                      "São Paulo",      "Brazil",
  "SBSV","Dep. L. E. Magalhães",           "Salvador",       "Brazil",
  "EDDF","Frankfurt",                      "Frankfurt",      "Europe",
  "EDDM","Munich",                         "Munich",         "Europe",
  "EGKK","Gatwick",                        "London",         "Europe",
  "EGLL","Heathrow",                       "London",         "Europe",
  "EHAM","Schiphol",                       "Amsterdam",      "Europe",
  "LEBL","El Prat",                        "Barcelona",      "Europe",
  "LEMD","Barajas",                        "Madrid",         "Europe",
  "LFPG","Charles de Gaulle",              "Paris",          "Europe",
  "LGAV","Eleftherios Venizelos",          "Athens",         "Europe",
  "LPPT","Humberto Delgado",               "Lisbon",         "Europe",
  "LSZH","Kloten",                         "Zurich",         "Europe",
  "LTFM","Istanbul Airport",               "Istanbul",       "Europe"
)
STUDY_BRA <- airports$icao[airports$region == "Brazil"]
STUDY_EUR <- airports$icao[airports$region == "Europe"]

# ── Punctuality helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
EARLY_GT15 <- c("(-INF,-60]","(-60,-55]","(-55,-50]","(-50,-45]","(-45,-40]",
                "(-40,-35]","(-35,-30]","(-30,-25]","(-25,-20]","(-20,-15]")
EARLY_5_15 <- c("(-15,-10]","(-10,-5]")
WITHIN5    <- c("(-5,0]","(0,5)")
LATE_5_15  <- c("[5,10)","[10,15)")
LATE_GT15  <- c("[15,20)","[20,25)","[25,30)","[30,35)","[35,40)",
                "[40,45)","[45,50)","[50,55)","[55,60)","[60,INF)")

agg_bands <- function(df) {
  df |>
    mutate(
      early_gt15 = rowSums(across(all_of(EARLY_GT15)), na.rm = TRUE),
      early_5_15 = rowSums(across(all_of(EARLY_5_15)), na.rm = TRUE),
      within5    = rowSums(across(all_of(WITHIN5)),    na.rm = TRUE),
      late_5_15  = rowSums(across(all_of(LATE_5_15)),  na.rm = TRUE),
      late_gt15  = rowSums(across(all_of(LATE_GT15)),  na.rm = TRUE)
    ) |>
    select(ICAO, DATE, PHASE, N_VALID,
           early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15)
}

to_pct <- function(df) {
  df |>
    mutate(tot = early_gt15 + early_5_15 + within5 + late_5_15 + late_gt15) |>
    mutate(across(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
                  ~ round(100 * .x / tot, 1))) |>
    select(-tot)
}

read_punct <- function(path, region, yr = NA) {
  d <- read.csv(path, check.names = FALSE) |>
    agg_bands() |>
    mutate(region = region, DATE = as.Date(DATE),
           year   = if (is.na(yr)) year(DATE) else as.integer(yr))
  d
}

punc_raw <- bind_rows(
  read_punct("data/PBWG-BRA-punc-2025.csv",          "Brazil", 2025),
  read_punct("data/PBWG-EUR-punc-2025.csv",           "Europe", 2025),
  read_punct("data/PBWG-EUR-PUNC-2024.csv",           "Europe", 2024),
  read_punct("data/PBWG-EUR-LGAV-punc-2024.csv",      "Europe", 2024),
  read_punct("data/PBWG-EUR-PUNC-2023.csv",           "Europe", 2023),
  read_punct("data/PBWG-EUR-PUNC-LPPT-2019-2024.csv", "Europe")
) |>
  filter(ICAO %in% c(STUDY_BRA, STUDY_EUR))

punc_annual <- punc_raw |>
  group_by(ICAO, region, year, PHASE) |>
  summarise(across(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
                   sum, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  to_pct() |>
  mutate(within15 = early_5_15 + within5 + late_5_15) |>
  left_join(airports[, c("icao","name","city")], by = c("ICAO" = "icao")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(ICAO, " – ", city))

# ── Traffic ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
traffic_daily <- bind_rows(
  read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-network-traffic-2023-2025.csv"),
  read.csv("data/PBWG-EUR-network-traffic-2023-2025.csv")
) |>
  mutate(DATE = as.Date(DATE), year = year(DATE)) |>
  arrange(REG, DATE) |>
  group_by(REG) |>
  mutate(roll7 = rollmean(FLTS, 7, fill = NA, align = "right")) |>
  ungroup()

traffic_annual <- traffic_daily |>
  group_by(REG, year) |>
  summarise(total = sum(FLTS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"),
         total_M = round(total / 1e6, 2))

# ── Capacity / BLI / PLI ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
bli_pli <- read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-EUR-bli-pli-2019-2025.csv") |>
  left_join(airports[, c("icao","name","city","region")],
            by = c("ICAO" = "icao")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(ICAO, " – ", city))

# ── Taxi ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
read_txxt <- function(path, region, yr) {
  read.csv(path) |>
    mutate(region = region, year = yr, DATE = as.Date(DATE))
}

txxt_annual <- bind_rows(
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-BRA-txxt-analytic-2023-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Brazil",2023),
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-BRA-txxt-analytic-2024-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Brazil",2024),
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-BRA-txxt-analytic-2025-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Brazil",2025),
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-EUR-txxt-analytic-2023-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Europe",2023),
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-EUR-txxt-analytic-2024-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Europe",2024),
  read_txxt("data/PBWG-EUR-txxt-analytic-2025-ref2024-icao_ganp_p20.csv","Europe",2025)
) |>
  filter(ICAO %in% c(STUDY_BRA, STUDY_EUR)) |>
  group_by(ICAO, region, year, PHASE) |>
  summarise(avg_add = sum(TOT_ADD_TIME, na.rm = TRUE) /
                      sum(MVTS_VALID,   na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  left_join(airports[, c("icao","city")], by = c("ICAO" = "icao")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(ICAO, " – ", city))

# ── Flows ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
flow_rank  <- read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-EUR-study-flow-rank-2023-2025.csv")
world_reg  <- read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-EUR-world-region-departures-2025.csv") |>
  filter(ADES_WORLD_REGION != "Unmapped") |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"),
         pct    = round(SHARE * 100, 1))

# ── Throughput ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
throughput <- read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-EUR-ordered-throughput-LPPT-SBGR-2019-2025.csv")

# ── DAIO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
daio <- read.csv("data/PBWG-BRA-EUR-daio-share-2025.csv") |>
  mutate(
    region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"),
    type   = recode(DAIO,
      I = "Domestic/Regional", D = "Departures",
      A = "Arrivals",          O = "Overflights"),
    pct = round(SHARE * 100, 1)
  )
```

# Overview

## Row {height=18%}

```{r kpi-bra}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Brazil 2025 – Controlled Flights"
bra25 <- traffic_annual |> filter(REG == "BRA", year == 2025)
list(
  value = paste0(bra25$total_M, " M"),
  icon  = "airplane",
  color = "#009C3B"
)
```

```{r kpi-eur}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Europe 2025 – Controlled Flights"
eur25 <- traffic_annual |> filter(REG == "EUR", year == 2025)
list(
  value = paste0(eur25$total_M, " M"),
  icon  = "globe",
  color = "#003399"
)
```

```{r kpi-ratio}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "EUR / BRA Traffic Ratio 2025"
ratio <- round(eur25$total_M / bra25$total_M, 1)
list(
  value = paste0(ratio, "×"),
  icon  = "bar-chart",
  color = "#6c757d"
)
```

```{r kpi-apt}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Study Airports"
list(value = "24", icon = "pin-map", color = "#495057")
```

## Row {height=82%}

### Col {width=60%}

```{r ov-traffic}
#| title: "Daily Traffic – 7-day Rolling Average (2023–2025)"
d <- traffic_daily |> filter(!is.na(roll7)) |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~DATE, y = ~roll7, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
        hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}<br>%{y:,.0f} flights<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = ""),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Flights / day (7-day avg)", tickformat = ","),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    hovermode = "x unified"
  )
```

### Col {width=40%}

```{r ov-daio}
#| title: "2025 Flight Distribution by Operation Type"
plot_ly(daio, x = ~pct, y = ~region, color = ~type,
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    xaxis   = list(title = "Share (%)"),
    yaxis   = list(title = ""),
    legend  = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

# Traffic

## Row {height=65%}

```{r tr-daily}
#| title: "Daily Flights – Brazil vs Europe (2023–2025)"
d <- traffic_daily |>
  filter(!is.na(roll7)) |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~DATE, y = ~roll7, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
        hovertemplate = "%{x|%d %b %Y}<br>%{y:,.0f} flights<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    xaxis     = list(title = "", rangeslider = list(visible = TRUE)),
    yaxis     = list(title = "Daily flights (7-day avg)", tickformat = ","),
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2),
    hovermode = "x unified"
  )
```

## Row {height=35%}

```{r tr-annual}
#| title: "Annual Totals"
traffic_annual |>
  select(Region = region, Year = year, `Total Flights` = total, `Million` = total_M) |>
  arrange(Region, Year) |>
  datatable(options = list(pageLength = 8, dom = "tip"), rownames = FALSE) |>
  formatCurrency("Total Flights", currency = "", digits = 0)
```

# Punctuality

## Row

### Col {.tabset}

```{r pt-arr-2025}
#| title: "Arrivals 2025"
d <- punc_annual |> filter(PHASE == "ARR", year == 2025) |>
  pivot_longer(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
               names_to = "band", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(band = factor(band,
    levels = c("early_gt15","early_5_15","within5","late_5_15","late_gt15"),
    labels = names(PUNCT_COLS))) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(ICAO, "\n", city))

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    barmode  = "stack",
    xaxis    = list(title = "", categoryorder = "array",
                    categoryarray = d$label[order(d$region, d$ICAO)]),
    yaxis    = list(title = "%"),
    legend   = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25),
    shapes   = list(list(type = "line", x0 = 11.5, x1 = 11.5,
                         y0 = 0, y1 = 100,
                         line = list(color = "grey", dash = "dot")))
  )
```

```{r pt-dep-2025}
#| title: "Departures 2025"
d <- punc_annual |> filter(PHASE == "DEP", year == 2025) |>
  pivot_longer(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
               names_to = "band", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(band = factor(band,
    levels = c("early_gt15","early_5_15","within5","late_5_15","late_gt15"),
    labels = names(PUNCT_COLS)))

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    xaxis   = list(title = "", categoryorder = "array",
                   categoryarray = d$label[order(d$region, d$ICAO)]),
    yaxis   = list(title = "%"),
    legend  = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25),
    shapes  = list(list(type = "line", x0 = 11.5, x1 = 11.5,
                        y0 = 0, y1 = 100,
                        line = list(color = "grey", dash = "dot")))
  )
```

```{r pt-arr-2024}
#| title: "Arrivals 2024"
d <- punc_annual |> filter(PHASE == "ARR", year == 2024) |>
  pivot_longer(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
               names_to = "band", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(band = factor(band,
    levels = c("early_gt15","early_5_15","within5","late_5_15","late_gt15"),
    labels = names(PUNCT_COLS)))

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    xaxis   = list(title = ""),
    yaxis   = list(title = "%"),
    legend  = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25)
  )
```

### Col {width=35%}

```{r pt-within15}
#| title: "% Within ±15 min (2025)"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(year == 2025) |>
  select(ICAO, city, region, PHASE, within15) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = PHASE, values_from = within15) |>
  rename(Arrivals = ARR, Departures = DEP) |>
  arrange(region, desc(Arrivals))

plot_ly(d, type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
        x = ~Arrivals, y = ~Departures,
        color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        text  = ~paste0(ICAO, " (", city, ")"),
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>ARR: %{x}%<br>DEP: %{y}%<extra></extra>",
        marker = list(size = 10)) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "Arrivals within ±15 min (%)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Departures within ±15 min (%)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

# Capacity

## Row

### Col {width=55%}

```{r cap-max}
#| title: "Declared Peak Capacity 2025 (flights/hour)"
d <- bli_pli |> filter(YEAR == max(YEAR)) |>
  arrange(MAX_CAP)

plot_ly(d, x = ~MAX_CAP, y = ~reorder(label, MAX_CAP),
        color = ~REG, colors = c(BRA = COL_BRA, EUR = COL_EUR),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x} flights/h<extra></extra>") |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "Flights / hour"),
    yaxis  = list(title = ""),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.1),
    margin = list(l = 160)
  )
```

### Col {width=45%}

```{r cap-bli}
#| title: "Busy-Level Index (BLI) – 2019–2025"
d <- bli_pli |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~YEAR, y = ~BLI, color = ~region,
        colors  = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type    = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text    = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: BLI = %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>",
        line    = list(width = 1), marker = list(size = 4),
        opacity = 0.7) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
    yaxis  = list(title = "BLI (share of hours > 20% cap)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

## Row

```{r cap-pli}
#| title: "Peak-Level Index (PLI) – 2019–2025"
d <- bli_pli |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~YEAR, y = ~PLI, color = ~region,
        colors  = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type    = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text    = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: PLI = %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>",
        line    = list(width = 1), marker = list(size = 4),
        opacity = 0.7) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
    yaxis  = list(title = "PLI (share of hours > 80% cap)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

# Taxi & ASMA

## Row {height=60%}

### Col {.tabset}

```{r tx-out}
#| title: "Taxi-Out (DEP)"
d <- txxt_annual |> filter(PHASE == "DEP")

plot_ly(d, x = ~year, y = ~avg_add, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:.2f} min<extra></extra>",
        line   = list(width = 1.5),
        marker = list(size = 6)) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Avg additional taxi-out (min)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

```{r tx-in}
#| title: "Taxi-In (ARR)"
d <- txxt_annual |> filter(PHASE == "ARR")

plot_ly(d, x = ~year, y = ~avg_add, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:.2f} min<extra></extra>",
        line   = list(width = 1.5),
        marker = list(size = 6)) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Avg additional taxi-in (min)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{r tx-table}
#| title: "Additional Taxi Times – Summary Table"
txxt_annual |>
  select(Airport = label, Region = region, Year = year,
         Phase = PHASE, `Avg add. time (min)` = avg_add) |>
  mutate(`Avg add. time (min)` = round(`Avg add. time (min)`, 2)) |>
  arrange(Region, Airport, Phase, Year) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 8, dom = "tip"),
            rownames = FALSE)
```

# BRA–EUR Flows

## Row

### Col {width=50%}

```{r fl-rank}
#| title: "Study Route Pair Rank Evolution (2023–2025)"
d <- flow_rank |>
  filter(PAIR_CLASS == "Study-Study") |>
  mutate(PAIR = factor(PAIR))

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(YEAR), y = ~RANK, color = ~PAIR,
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{fullData.name}</b><br>Year %{x} → Rank %{y}<extra></extra>",
        marker = list(size = 8)) |>
  layout(
    yaxis  = list(title = "Rank (1 = busiest)", autorange = "reversed"),
    xaxis  = list(title = ""),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

### Col {width=50%}

```{r fl-world}
#| title: "International Departures by World Region 2025"
plot_ly(world_reg,
        x = ~pct, y = ~reorder(ADES_WORLD_REGION, pct),
        color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = COL_BRA, Europe = COL_EUR),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "%{y}<br>%{x}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(
    barmode = "group",
    xaxis   = list(title = "Share of external departures (%)"),
    yaxis   = list(title = ""),
    legend  = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

# Airport Comparison

## Row {height=55%}

### Col {width=50%}

```{r cmp-sbgr}
#| title: "SBGR – Guarulhos (São Paulo) · Arrival Punctuality"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(ICAO == "SBGR", PHASE == "ARR") |>
  pivot_longer(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
               names_to = "band", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(band = factor(band,
    levels = c("early_gt15","early_5_15","within5","late_5_15","late_gt15"),
    labels = names(PUNCT_COLS)))

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(year), y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = "Year"), yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

### Col {width=50%}

```{r cmp-lppt}
#| title: "LPPT – Humberto Delgado (Lisbon) · Arrival Punctuality"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(ICAO == "LPPT", PHASE == "ARR") |>
  pivot_longer(c(early_gt15, early_5_15, within5, late_5_15, late_gt15),
               names_to = "band", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(band = factor(band,
    levels = c("early_gt15","early_5_15","within5","late_5_15","late_gt15"),
    labels = names(PUNCT_COLS)))

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(year), y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = "Year"), yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

## Row {height=45%}

```{r cmp-thru}
#| title: "Ordered Arrival Throughput – SBGR vs LPPT (2019–2025)"
d <- throughput |>
  mutate(airport = paste0(ICAO, ifelse(REG == "BRA",
    " – Guarulhos (BRA)", " – Lisbon (EUR)")))

plot_ly(d, x = ~RANK, y = ~TOT_THRU,
        color  = ~airport,
        colors = c("SBGR – Guarulhos (BRA)" = COL_BRA,
                   "LPPT – Lisbon (EUR)"    = COL_EUR),
        linetype = ~factor(YEAR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
        hovertemplate = "Rank %{x}<br>%{y} flights/h<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>",
        line = list(width = 1.2), opacity = 0.8) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "Rank (busiest hours first)"),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Total throughput (flights/h)"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

# Data

## Row {.tabset}

```{r dt-punc}
#| title: "Punctuality (annual)"
punc_annual |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = name, City = city, Region = region,
         Year = year, Phase = PHASE,
         `Early >15` = early_gt15, `Early 5–15` = early_5_15,
         `Within ±5` = within5, `Late 5–15` = late_5_15,
         `Late >15` = late_gt15, `Within ±15 (%)` = within15) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-traffic}
#| title: "Traffic (daily)"
traffic_daily |>
  select(Region = REG, Date = DATE, Year = year,
         Total = FLTS, Roll7d = roll7) |>
  mutate(Roll7d = round(Roll7d, 0)) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-capacity}
#| title: "Capacity / BLI / PLI"
bli_pli |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = name, City = city, Region = region,
         Year = YEAR, `Max Cap` = MAX_CAP, BLI, PLI) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE) |>
  formatRound(c("BLI","PLI"), digits = 4)
```

```{r dt-taxi}
#| title: "Taxi & ASMA"
txxt_annual |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = label, Region = region, Year = year,
         Phase = PHASE, `Avg add. (min)` = avg_add) |>
  mutate(`Avg add. (min)` = round(`Avg add. (min)`, 2)) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-flows}
#| title: "BRA–EUR Route Pairs"
flow_rank |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE)
```
